content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_ServiceTickets
 --drop view BI_ServiceTickets

AS

    SELECT
        H.ORNO AS [Order Number],
        H.AOTY AS [Order Type],
        H.AOTC AS [Order Category],
        H.PRNO AS [Product],
        H.CUNO AS [Customer Number],
        H.AAGN AS [Agreement],
        H.TAIL AS [Registration Number],
        H.AOSL AS [Lowest Status],
        H.AOST AS [Highest Status],
        H.ORDT AS [Order Date],
        H.AAP1 AS [Planned Receipt Date],
        H.AADT AS [Actual Receipt Date],
        H.APD1 AS [Planned Delivery Date],
        H.RLDT AS [Requested Delivery Date],
        H.CODT AS [Confirmed Delivery Date],
        H.AACD AS [Actual Delivery Date],
        H.RESP AS [Responsible],
        H.YREF AS [Your Reference],
        H.OREF AS [Our Reference],
        H.OPRI AS [Priority],
        H.ACSE AS [Serial Number Administration],
        H.AMWA AS [Manufacture Warranty],
        L.BANO AS [Lot Number],
        L.STRT AS [Product Structure Type],
        L.SUFI AS [Service],
        L.AORQ AS [Order Quantity],
        L.AOST AS [Status],
        L.RSCD AS [Transaction Reason],
        L.WHLO AS [Warehouse],
        L.PONR AS [Order Line],
        S.FLNO AS [Item Number]
    
    FROM M3.ACUORH H
    LEFT JOIN M3.ACUORL L ON H.ORNO = L.ORNO
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT DISTINCT
            SERN,
            FLNO
        FROM M3.MILOIN ) S ON L.BANO = S.SERN

    --select top 100 * from M3.MILOIN where FLNO = 'MIM75' SERN = '200710937'
    --select top 100 * from M3.ACUORH ORDER BY ORDT DESC
